scripts.build: if [ -x /opt/homebrew/bin/cargo ] && [ -x /opt/homebrew/bin/rustc ]; then PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/cargo" ] && [ -x "$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/rustc" ]; then PATH="$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-aarch64-apple-darwin/bin:$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"; elif [ -f "$HOME/.cargo/env" ]; then . "$HOME/.cargo/env"; fi; tauri build
